raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Inclusion for students with disabilities in general education classrooms has been demonstrated to increase academic and graduation outcomes for all students.",
    "California's current rate of inclusion for students with disabilities is 10 points lower than the national average.",
    "SB 692 aims to link federal special education indicators to the California School Dashboard to make data on inclusion capabilities searchable.",
    "Inclusive programs have been shown to improve academic and graduation outcomes for both special education and non-special education students.",
    "SB 1184 aims to improve care coordination for students accessing behavioral health services on school campuses.",
    "Children placed with relatives have better physical and emotional health outcomes in the long term than those placed in foster care or congregate care.",
    "Research indicates that children who grew up in a family environment experience better health outcomes than those in foster or congregate care."
  ]
}
```
